Run for the Republic: Kirtane & Pandit celebrated the 76th Republic day by organising a marathon at the Pune office.
Cert-In: We are proud to announce that we are now one of the few Cert-In certified chartered accountant firms
Envision: Kirtane & Pandit Consulting is proud to partner with IGCC as a Knowledge Partner for Envision 2025, held in Pune on 28th February.
WOFA: We were a gold sponsor at the esteemed WOFA event held by ICAI on 31st Jan- 2nd Feb at Yashobhoomi, Delhi, India

IPO Consulting

Consulting & Advisory
  • Forensic & Fraud Investigations
  • Transaction Advisory
  • Due diligence, Mergers & Acquisitions
  • Sustainability Advisory & ESG
  • Advisory Solutions
  • Valuation
  • IPO Consulting

Our IPO and Capital Market Advisory services are designed to guide businesses through the complexities of raising capital and going public in India. We provide end-to-end support, including IPO readiness assessments, regulatory compliance, financial restructuring, and drafting prospectuses. Our expertise extends to navigating SEBI regulations, coordinating with merchant bankers, and ensuring the efficient execution of public offerings. Whether you’re a startup aiming to list on SME platforms or an established enterprise targeting major exchanges, we deliver tailored solutions to meet your unique objectives and maximize value creation.


How we can help?


Pre IPO
1. IPO Readiness Evaluation- Assessment of various SEBI parameters for preparedness and drawing a Roadmap to IPO
2. Corporate Restructuring
3. Implementation of IFC


IPO Project Management
1. Preparation of Restated Financial Statement under Ind AS
2. ESG considerations
3. Identification of KPIs
4. Valuation
5. Secretarial Due Diligence and assessment of Corporate Governance
6. Creating and Managing data rooms
7. Assisting CFO, Auditors, and other consultants on Financial Reporting, and various certifications required by regulators before filing offer documents


Listing and Post IPO
1. Assisting CFO and CS on post-listing secretarial matters
2. Assisting with the preparation of the prospectus
3. Preparation for data for various post-listing compliances


Overview of the IPO Process - Key Understandings:


Overview of the IPO Process:




IPO Assurance:

Our IPO and Capital Market Assurance services provide comprehensive audit and assurance solutions to support companies navigating the public listing process in India. We specialize in delivering pre-IPO audits, financial due diligence, and ensuring compliance with SEBI and stock exchange requirements. Our services include comfort letters, financial statement certifications, and independent assurance for prospectus disclosures. With a focus on accuracy, transparency, and regulatory adherence, we enable businesses to inspire investor confidence and achieve seamless access to capital markets.
